tasks.title: Add Tasks Validation
tasks.description:
## Context
Malformed tasks.json files should fail fast with clear error messages rather than causing undefined behavior during execution. This validation layer ensures structure correctness and enforces the sequential execution model.

## Scope
- Create ValidateTasks function for centralized validation
- Validate required fields (id, title, status)
- Validate status values (todo, in_progress, done)
- Validate unique task IDs
- Validate strict sequential blocker chain
- Collect and report all errors at once

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] 1.1 Create `ValidateTasks(tasks []Task, filePath string) error` function in `internal/tasks/json.go`
- [ ] 1.2 Implement required field validation (id, title, status non-empty)
- [ ] 1.3 Implement status value validation (todo, in_progress, done)
- [ ] 1.4 Implement unique ID validation with duplicate detection
- [ ] 1.5 Implement sequential blocker chain validation (one root, single blockers, all reachable)
- [ ] 1.6 Implement multi-error collection and formatted error message
- [ ] 1.7 Add unit tests for all validation scenarios

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. Create ValidateTasks function skeleton with error slice collection
2. Implement field presence checks (id, title, status)
3. Implement status enum validation
4. Implement ID uniqueness check with seen map
5. Implement blocker chain validation (find root, walk chain, check coverage)
6. Format multi-error output with file path header
7. Write comprehensive unit tests

## Acceptance criteria
- ValidateTasks returns nil for valid tasks.json
- ValidateTasks returns multi-error with all issues for invalid files
- Error messages include file path, task ID, and index
- All validation scenarios from specs/tasks-validation/spec.md have passing tests
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: What Changes)
- design.md (section: Decision 2 - Validation is a separate function)
- specs/tasks-validation/spec.md (all requirements)

tasks.title: Add Tasks Flag
tasks.description:
## Context
Users need explicit control over tasks.json location via `--tasks/-t` flag. This enables using arbitrary task files without relying on convention-based resolution from --change or default paths.

## Scope
- Add --tasks/-t flag to run command
- Implement flag priority: -t > -c > default
- Validate file existence for explicit paths
- Handle flag combinations correctly

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] 2.1 Add `--tasks/-t` flag to run command in `cmd/littlefactory/main.go`
- [ ] 2.2 Implement flag priority resolution (-t > -c > default)
- [ ] 2.3 Add file existence validation for explicit --tasks path
- [ ] 2.4 Update `validateChangeFlags` to handle new flag combinations
- [ ] 2.5 Add unit tests for flag parsing and priority

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. Add tasksPath variable and flag registration in init()
2. Update runRun to check tasksPath first in resolution chain
3. Add file existence check when tasksPath is specified
4. Update or create validation function for flag combinations
5. Write unit tests for all priority scenarios

## Acceptance criteria
- `littlefactory run claude -t path.json` uses explicit path
- `littlefactory run claude -t x.json -c change` uses -t (ignores -c)
- `littlefactory run claude -t nonexistent.json` errors with clear message
- All flag priority scenarios from specs/change-flag/spec.md have passing tests
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: What Changes)
- design.md (section: Decision 3 - Flag priority)
- specs/change-flag/spec.md (all requirements)

tasks.title: Integrate Validation on Load
tasks.description:
## Context
Validation must happen once at load time in the JSONTaskSource constructors. This ensures invalid files are rejected immediately with clear errors rather than causing issues during task execution.

## Scope
- Call validation from both constructors
- Add file existence check to explicit path constructor
- Update constructor signatures to return errors
- Update all callers to handle errors

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] 3.1 Update `NewJSONTaskSource` to call validation after parsing
- [ ] 3.2 Update `NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath` to call validation after parsing
- [ ] 3.3 Add file existence check to `NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath`
- [ ] 3.4 Update constructors to return error (change signature if needed)
- [ ] 3.5 Update callers in main.go to handle constructor errors

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. Change NewJSONTaskSource signature to return (*JSONTaskSource, error)
2. Change NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath signature to return (*JSONTaskSource, error)
3. Add os.Stat check in NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath for file existence
4. Call ValidateTasks after readTasks in both constructors
5. Update main.go to handle constructor errors with appropriate exit

## Acceptance criteria
- NewJSONTaskSource returns error for invalid tasks.json
- NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath returns error for missing file
- NewJSONTaskSourceWithPath returns error for invalid content
- main.go exits with error message when constructors fail
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: What Changes)
- design.md (section: Decision 1 - Validation at load time)
- specs/json-task-source/spec.md (modified requirements)

tasks.title: Remove Obsolete Skill
tasks.description:
## Context
The openspec-to-lf skill is obsolete because the schema's tasks-littlefactory artifact provides the same functionality, and --change reads directly from the change directory.

## Scope
- Remove embedded skill directory
- Remove installed skill directory
- Update any tests referencing the skill

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] 4.1 Remove `internal/init/skills/embedded/skills/openspec-to-lf/` directory
- [ ] 4.2 Remove `.littlefactory/skills/openspec-to-lf/` from project (if exists)
- [ ] 4.3 Update any tests that reference the removed skill

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. Delete internal/init/skills/embedded/skills/openspec-to-lf/ directory
2. Delete .littlefactory/skills/openspec-to-lf/ directory if present
3. Search for references to openspec-to-lf in tests and update
4. Run tests to verify no breakage

## Acceptance criteria
- openspec-to-lf directory does not exist in embedded skills
- openspec-to-lf directory does not exist in .littlefactory/skills
- All tests pass
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: What Changes)

tasks.title: Update Schema
tasks.description:
## Context
The littlefactory schema currently instructs writing tasks.json to both the change directory and .littlefactory/. Since --change reads directly from the change directory, the copy is unnecessary.

## Scope
- Update live schema in openspec/schemas/
- Update embedded schema in internal/init/openspec/
- Remove instruction to write to .littlefactory/tasks.json

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] 5.1 Update `openspec/schemas/littlefactory/schema.yaml` tasks-littlefactory instruction to write only to change directory
- [ ] 5.2 Update `internal/init/openspec/embedded/schema/schema.yaml` to match

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. Edit openspec/schemas/littlefactory/schema.yaml - update tasks-littlefactory instruction
2. Edit internal/init/openspec/embedded/schema/schema.yaml to match
3. Verify both files have identical content

## Acceptance criteria
- Schema instructs writing tasks.json only to change directory
- No mention of .littlefactory/tasks.json in schema
- Both schema files (live and embedded) are in sync
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/tasks-flag-and-validation/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: What Changes)
- design.md (section: Context)
